name: Guardian Arkveld
description:
What happens when a touch starved ancient artificial life form on a feeding frenzy discovers what love is? Well that's something for me to make and you to experience, enjoy some time with your big crazy monster kidnapper!

Since JAI stopped with the images this is a perfect time for me to instead do bots that wouldn't have many other images! Genius am I right?

Been playing a lot of Monster Hunter Wilds recently, actually been playing nothing but it. So I decided to make this for y'all, hopefully it's up to standard!

Art by hotpink_0106 on Twitter/X go check them out for the full image!
creator: Definitely_Not_Mantis
